seo.title: Parsons Pest Management Store | Expert Pest Control in Dallas, TX
seo.description: Top-rated pest control in Dallas, TX. Eliminate roaches, rodents, termites & more with our proven, eco-friendly treatments. Same-day service available. Call (469) 529-0860.

hero.headline: Protect Your Home & Family from Unwanted Pests
hero.subheadline: Fast, reliable, and eco-friendly pest control solutions tailored to Dallas homes and businesses.

featureSections.title: Total Pest Elimination for Dallas Properties
featureSections.body: From cockroaches to termites, our integrated pest management approach targets the root cause of infestations. We use safe, low-odor treatments that are effective against even the toughest pests, ensuring your home remains pest-free year-round.
bullets: Thorough inspection and customized treatment plan
Eco-friendly products safe for kids and pets
Preventative maintenance to stop future outbreaks
featureSections.cardBody: If pests return between treatments, we come back at no extra cost. Your satisfaction is 100% guaranteed.

featureSections.title: Licensed, Trained, and Local
featureSections.body: Our team undergoes rigorous training to stay current on the latest pest control techniques. We know Dallas pests inside and out — from fire ants to German roaches — and we tailor every treatment to your specific situation.
bullets: Friendly, uniformed professionals who respect your home
Same-day service available for urgent infestations
featureSections.cardBody: We understand the seasonal cycles of pests in North Texas, allowing us to anticipate and prevent infestations before they start.

whyChooseUs.title: Fast Response
whyChooseUs.description: We offer same-day service for urgent pest problems. Call us by noon and we'll be at your door.

whyChooseUs.title: Transparent Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: No hidden fees, no surprise charges. You get a clear quote upfront before any work begins.

whyChooseUs.title: Eco-Friendly Options
whyChooseUs.description: Our green pest control line uses plant-based products that are tough on pests but gentle on the environment.

whyChooseUs.title: Lifetime Warranty
whyChooseUs.description: We stand behind our work. If pests reappear between scheduled visits, we retreat for free.

testimonials.quote: Parsons Pest saved us from a major roach infestation. The technician was on time, explained everything, and we haven't seen a single roach since. Highly recommend!
testimonials.author: Jennifer L.

testimonials.quote: We've used Parsons for two years now. They're always professional, the treatments are effective, and their customer service is top-notch.
testimonials.author: Mark T.

testimonials.quote: After trying three other companies, Parsons finally solved our ant problem. They found the nest and treated it directly. Worth every penny.
testimonials.author: Rachel S.

cta.headline: Ready to Reclaim Your Home?
cta.subheadline: Schedule your free inspection today and get $50 off your first treatment.

servicesPage.intro: We offer a full range of pest control services for Dallas homes and businesses. Each treatment is customized to your property and the specific pest problem. Our certified technicians use the latest methods to deliver fast, lasting results.

services.title: General Pest Control
services.shortDescription: Ongoing protection against common household pests like roaches, ants, spiders, and more.
services.longDescription: Our general pest control plan provides quarterly treatments to keep your home free from the most common invaders. We inspect inside and out, seal entry points, and apply targeted treatments that eliminate current pests and prevent new ones.
benefits: Quarterly visits with full perimeter treatment
Year-round prevention for ants, roaches, spiders, silverfish
Free re-service between visits if needed

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We thoroughly inspect your home's interior and exterior to identify pest activity and entry points.

process.title: Treatment
process.description: We apply low-odor, targeted treatments to affected areas and create a protective barrier around your home.

process.title: Follow-Up
process.description: We return quarterly to reapply and adjust treatment based on seasonal pest activity.

faqs.question: Is the treatment safe for my pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use pet-safe products and advise keeping pets away during application. Once dry, it's completely safe.

faqs.question: How long does the treatment last?
faqs.answer: Our general pest control treatments remain effective for about 90 days, which is why we recommend quarterly service.

services.title: Termite Control & Prevention
services.shortDescription: Protect your largest investment from the silent destroyer. Comprehensive termite solutions.
services.longDescription: Termites cause billions in damage each year. Our termite control program includes thorough inspections, liquid soil treatments, and baiting systems to eliminate colonies and prevent future infestations. We use Sentricon® and Termidor® for proven results.
benefits: Advanced baiting or liquid barrier options
Transferable warranty for peace of mind

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We perform a detailed inspection using moisture meters and infrared tools to detect termite activity.

process.title: Treatment Plan
process.description: Based on the infestation type, we design a treatment plan using bait stations or liquid termiticide.

process.title: Monitoring
process.description: We monitor bait stations quarterly and retreat as needed until the colony is eliminated.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have termites?
faqs.answer: Signs include mud tubes, hollow-sounding wood, and discarded wings. We offer free inspections to confirm.

faqs.question: How long does termite treatment take?
faqs.answer: Initial treatment can be completed in one day. Baiting systems may take a few weeks to fully eliminate the colony.

services.title: Rodent Control & Exclusion
services.shortDescription: Seal out rats and mice with our comprehensive exclusion and removal services.
services.longDescription: Rodents can spread disease and cause structural damage. Our rodent control service begins with a thorough inspection to identify entry points and nesting sites. We then seal gaps, set traps, and provide ongoing monitoring to ensure your home stays rodent-free.

process.title: Inspection & Assessment
process.description: We identify all possible entry points, from gaps in siding to roof vents.

process.title: Exclusion
process.description: We seal openings with steel wool, caulk, and metal flashing to prevent re-entry.

process.title: Trapping & Removal
process.description: We set traps in strategic locations and remove captured rodents until activity ceases.

faqs.question: How long does rodent exclusion take?
faqs.answer: Most exclusions are completed within one to two days, depending on the size of the property.

faqs.question: Will the rodents come back?
faqs.answer: Our exclusion work is thorough, but we offer follow-up visits to ensure seals remain intact.

services.title: Bed Bug Treatment
services.shortDescription: Fast, effective bed bug elimination using heat and chemical treatments.
services.longDescription: Bed bugs are notoriously difficult to eliminate. Our bed bug treatment combines heat therapy, steam, and targeted chemical applications to kill bed bugs at all life stages. We also provide preparation guidance and follow-up inspections to ensure complete eradication.
benefits: Heat treatment reaches all hiding spots

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We use canine detection and visual inspection to locate all harborages.

process.title: Treatment
process.description: We apply heat treatment (120°F+) and steam to kill bugs and eggs, followed by a residual chemical spray.

process.title: Follow-Up
process.description: We return in 14 days for a re-inspection and second treatment if necessary.

faqs.question: Do I need to leave my home during treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes, for heat treatment you must vacate for 6-8 hours. Chemical treatments require a few hours.

faqs.question: How many treatments are needed?
faqs.answer: Most infestations require 1-2 treatments. We guarantee elimination with our two-visit protocol.

about.headline: Your Local Pest Control Partner Since 2008
about.mission: To provide Dallas families and businesses with safe, effective, and affordable pest control solutions that protect their property and peace of mind.
story: Parsons Pest Management Store was founded in 2008 by owner Mike Parsons, a Dallas native who saw a need for honest, reliable pest control in the community. Starting with a single truck and a commitment to quality, Mike built a company known for its thoroughness and transparency. Over the years, we've grown to a team of 12 certified technicians, but we've never lost our small-business dedication to customer satisfaction.

Today, we serve thousands of homes and businesses across the Dallas metro area. Our approach combines the latest pest control technology with old-fashioned customer service. We believe in educating our clients, using eco-friendly products when possible, and standing behind every job with a 100% satisfaction guarantee. When you call Parsons, you're not just a customer — you're a neighbor.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We give honest advice and transparent pricing. No upsells, no pressure.

coreValues.title: Excellence
coreValues.description: We invest in ongoing training and the best equipment to deliver superior results.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We live and work in Dallas, and we're committed to making our community a better place.

coreValues.title: Sustainability
coreValues.description: We prioritize eco-friendly treatments to protect your family and the environment.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Ready to solve your pest problem? Call or fill out our form for a free quote.
